title: Ken Hiller
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Person |image=[[File:KenHiller.jpg]] |name=Ken Hiller |birth=[[October 18]], [[1930s#1938|1938]]
Bridgeport, Connecticut{{WebCite|url=https://www.harpermorrismemorialchapel.com/obituary/4240298 |work=Harper-Morris Memorial Chapel |text=Ken Hiller |archivedate=20240220053029 }} |death=[[July 13]], [[2016]]
Gulf Breeze, Florida |listedpronouns= |nationality=[[Wikipedia:American|American]] |occupation=[[Wikipedia:Voice acting|Voice artist]] [[Star Wars radio dramas|''Star Wars'' radio dramas]] |companies= |website= }} {{Quote|A long time ago, in a galaxy far, far away... There came a time of revolution, when rebels united to challenge a tyrannical empire.|audio=ATimeOfRevolution.flac|Ken Hiller's narration at the start of each installment of the radio dramas|[[Star Wars (radio)|''Star Wars'' radio drama]]}} '''Ken Hiller''' ([[October 18]], [[1930s#1938|1938]] — [[July 13]], [[2016]]) was a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] for radio and television. He narrated the [[opening crawl]], outro, and end credits for all episodes of the [[Star Wars radio dramas|''Star Wars'' radio dramas]]: [[Star Wars (radio)|''Star Wars'']], [[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|''The Empire Strikes Back'']], and [[Return of the Jedi (radio)|''Return of the Jedi'']] - 29 episodes in all. He also was the narrator of the audio dramas ''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'', ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' and ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''.[[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|''Dark Forces'' audio dramas]] Hiller first entered broadcasting in Hawaii but spent most of his career in St Paul, Minnesota, an important center for public radio in the United States. Besides his narration for ''Star Wars'' audio dramas, he hosted radio programs, recorded commercials, and did other voiceover work. ==Works== ===Discography=== {|{{Prettytable}} ! Year !! Title !! Contribution(s) |- |[[1981]]||[[Star Wars (radio)|''Star Wars'']]|| Narrator[[Star Wars (radio)|''Star Wars'' (radio)]] |- |[[1983]]||[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|''The Empire Strikes Back'']]|| Narrator[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|''The Empire Strikes Back'' (radio)]] |- |[[1996]]||[[Return of the Jedi (radio)|''Return of the Jedi'']]||Narrator[[Return of the Jedi (radio)|''Return of the Jedi'']] |- |[[1997]] || [[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]] || Narrator[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'']] |- |[[1998]] || [[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]] || Narrator[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]] |- |1998 || [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]] || Narrator[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]] |} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{IMDb|name/nm2091001}} [[Category:Dark Forces: Jedi Knight audio drama voice actors]] [[Category:Dark Forces: Rebel Agent audio drama voice actors]] [[Category:Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire audio drama voice actors]] [[Category:Deceased actors]] [[Category:Return of the Jedi radio drama voice actors]] [[Category:Star Wars radio drama voice actors]] [[Category:The Empire Strikes Back radio drama voice actors]]
